title: Speed Post India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Speed Post India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Speed Post India! We are hiring a Warehouse Manager for our Vadodara team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Speed Post India:
Speed Post India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Route Optimization

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Speed Post India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
